summary: Completed testing of two bug fixes: 1) Admin menu visibility based on is_admin field, 2) Marketplace join button disabled for already-joined tontines. All backend tests pass (7/7 passed, 1 skipped). All frontend UI tests pass.

issues: Minor accessibility warning: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning only)

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 passed, 1 skipped - no active tontines for re-join test)

seed_data_creation: Completed KYC for admin@savyn.com. Admin joined 'Test Tontine API' tontine during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified working: 1) is_admin field correctly returned in login/register/me responses - admin@savyn.com gets is_admin=true, others get false. 2) Admin nav link correctly shows only for admin users (visible for admin@savyn.com, hidden for savyn_new@test.com). 3) Marketplace correctly shows 'Inscrit' (gray, disabled) button for tontines user has joined, 'Rejoindre' button for others.

✅ GET /api/tontines/marketplace returns open tontines without participants list
⏭ Re-joining tontine test skipped (no pre-existing joined tontines)
✅ Admin nav link (data-testid='admin-nav-link') IS VISIBLE when logged in as admin@savyn.com
✅ Admin nav link is NOT visible when logged in as savyn_new@test.com (non-admin)
✅ Contract dialog opens when clicking 'Rejoindre' button for verified KYC user
✅ Contract dialog shows tontine details and acceptance checkbox
✅ After joining tontine, marketplace shows 'Deja inscrit' text and gray 'Inscrit' button
✅ 'Inscrit' button is correctly DISABLED for already-joined tontines
mocked_api_note: KYC verification is auto-approved (simulated). Payments are simulated via Stripe test mode. Lemon Way integration is in sandbox_simulated mode.
